title: Smart India Hackathon 2026
organizer: Ministry of Education, Govt. of India
description: India's biggest hackathon — 36-hour non-stop coding event with problem statements from 30+ Ministries and Industries. Open to all college students.

title: Devfolio Hackathon — Build for Bharat
description: Build products that solve real-world problems in India. Fintech, AgriTech, HealthTech and more. Online + offline format. Teams of 2-4.

title: HackerEarth April Circuits
description: Monthly competitive programming contest — solve algorithmic problems ranging from easy to hard. Rated event that boosts your global ranking.

title: ICPC 2026 — South India Regionals
description: The International Collegiate Programming Contest (ICPC) is the world's premier algorithmic programming competition. Teams of 3 compete in timed problem sets.

title: NASA Space Apps Challenge
description: A global hackathon where participants use NASA's open data to develop solutions to challenges on Earth and in space. 48-hour online event.

title: CodeChef SnackDown 2026
description: One of India's most prestigious team programming contests. Preliminary rounds online, finals offline in Bengaluru. Open to teams of 2.

title: Google Summer of Code 2026
description: A global program where students contribute to open-source projects under guidance of mentors from 200+ organizations. Work remotely over the summer.

title: Flipkart GRiD 6.0
description: Flipkart's flagship engineering challenge for students. Solve problems in Supply Chain, Machine Learning, and Software Engineering. Top performers get Pre-Placement Offers.

title: Microsoft Imagine Cup 2026
description: Empowering tech innovators to change the world. Use Microsoft Azure and AI to tackle global challenges in education, environment, health, and more.

title: Hack This Fall 2026
description: India's community-first hackathon for college students. Build real-world projects, network with mentors and recruiters, win prizes and job offers.
